heading: Persons heretofore having a pensionable status
label: 1504 Persons heretofore having a pensionable status
text: The pension benefits of subchapters II and III of this chapter shall, notwithstanding the service requirements of such subchapters, be granted to persons heretofore recognized by law as having a pensionable status.
